stemHtml: During a low-speed stall, how does a straight-wing airplane typically behave?

options.a: Reduced flight control authority, buffeting, and pitch down.
options.b: A descent along a steep, downward spiral path, yawing towards the low wing.
options.c: A descent along a steep, downward spiral path, yawing towards the high wing.
options.d: Reduced flight control authority, buffeting, and pitch up.
